message:
fix(connector): guard ecosystem reputation scoring against NaN/Inf propagation

deterministic_reputation_score() now returns 0.0 for non-finite inputs
instead of propagating NaN through .clamp() (which passes NaN through).
is_anomalous_delta() now treats non-finite deltas as inherently anomalous
and guards against NaN in history values corrupting mean/variance stats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
